fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Timestamp of when the action was taken

fields.name: destination
fields.description: System that received the message (may be 'none' for internal use)

fields.name: messageType
fields.description: Type of action taken on the account

fields.name: priority
fields.description: Level of urgency for the message

fields.name: action
fields.description: Type of action taken on the account (e.g. freeze, block)

children.name: accountNumber
children.description: Unique identifier for the account

children.name: accountHolder
children.description: Name of the account holder

children.name: accountType
children.description: Type of account (e.g. current, savings)

children.name: currency
children.description: Currency associated with the account

children.name: branch
children.description: Branch where the account is held

children.name: freezeType
children.description: Type of freeze (e.g. full, partial)

children.name: reason
children.description: Reason for the freeze

children.name: description
children.description: Detailed description of the freeze

children.name: initiatedBy
children.description: Person who initiated the freeze

children.name: department
children.description: Department that initiated the freeze

children.name: effectiveFrom
children.description: Timestamp when the freeze took effect

children.name: allowIncomingTransfers
children.description: Allow incoming transfers to the account

children.name: allowOutgoingTransfers
children.description: Allow outgoing transfers from the account

children.name: allowWithdrawals
children.description: Allow withdrawals from the account

children.name: allowCardTransactions
children.description: Allow card transactions on the account

children.name: allowCheques
children.description: Allow cheque transactions on the account

children.name: level
children.description: Level of escalation required

children.name: requiresApproval
children.description: Whether approval is required for the freeze

children.name: approvalDeadline
children.description: Timestamp by which approval must be given

children.name: complianceOfficer
children.description: Name of the compliance officer responsible for approval

children.name: caseReference
children.description: Unique reference for the case

children.name: riskScore
children.description: Risk score associated with the account

children.name: customerNotificationSent
children.description: Whether a notification was sent to the customer

children.name: regulatoryReporting
children.description: Whether regulatory reporting is required for the freeze
